title: Writing a Correct Binary Search Function
scenario: Given a sorted array and a target value, generate a recursive function to find the index of the target value using binary search. The function should return the index if the target is found, otherwise return -1. Ensure the function handles edge cases such as array boundaries and non-existant target values.
constraints: Must include a recursive approach to search the array
Must handle edge cases for array boundaries and non-existent target values

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the function correctly find the index of the target value?
Is the code well-structured, concise, and clear?
Is recursion used to search the array?
Are edge cases correctly handled for array boundaries and non-existent target values?
